title: anaphalis gracilis var. gracilis
intro: Anaphalis gracilis var. gracilis, commonly known as Western Pyrethrum or Western Catnip, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Anaphalis gracilis var. gracilis include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Anaphalis gracilis var. gracilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
